creator: mark@exonetric.com
text:
I'm guessing that gcc has moved on from the issues in 2005? and wouldn't NetBSD have these same
issues?

http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base/head/lib/msun/src/math_private.h?sortby=date&view=diff&r1=151864&r2=151865

In any case, perhaps the apple version is more likely to be suitable?

http://www.opensource.apple.com/source/Libm/Libm-315/Source/Intel/complex.c
